title: OpenStax Psychology 2e
description: A source card for the OpenStax Psychology 2e textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Psychology 2e introduces research methods, biology and behavior, sensation, learning, memory, development, personality, social psychology, and mental health.
Use this source for nonfiction reading tied to self-understanding, research design, brain science, and media claims about human behavior.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
